name: bloc-signals
description: Package-specific guidance for implementing, testing, reviewing, and migrating Dart and Flutter applications that use BlocSignal.

interface.longDescription: Use package-specific workflows for BlocSignal event handling, Flutter bindings, lifecycle ownership, testing, classic BLoC migration, and OpenTelemetry tracing.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect this project and help me implement the BlocSignal change with the package's actual API and lifecycle rules.
